equips.equip_desc:
As he can give much amount of damage while going roamer
-arcane boots conceal to support the teammates to ambush the enemy and can also be helpful to escape
-genius wand to lower the enemy magic defence and give him the advantage
-lighting truncheon to give the maximum amount of damage and increase damage dealers for it's second skill
-holy crystal to increase the damage for it's ultimate and overall 
-Glowing wand to finish of the low HP enemy and to continue damage
-Dominance ice to slow down enemy and making hard for them to escape

-Arcane boots encourage to help your team attack speed and overpowering enemy
-fleeting time it's can help the ultimate to cold down faster when killing and enemy and giving a better team support
-divine glaive to penetrate the enemy magic defence build and making the hero advantage
-genius wand to reduce the magic defence and deal damage it's maximum and making the hero the tanky mage
-dominance ice to reduce the enemy sprints speed and to slow their attack speed giving your team a better upper hand in battlefield
-immortality it's very important as he use his ultimate to hit enemy it's very risky as they can ambush it's so the immortality give the hero a second chance to escape and to chase low ho again

hero.hero_overview: Johnson is know for it's damage while going roamer depending on the build he can play role as tank while giving much damage and dominate the enemy with overpowering in team fight
hero.hero_strength:
He can first help the jungler to farm faster to dominate enemy in early after that he can give support to markman
when his ultimate was there he can rotate to exp lane to give support as he can rotate every lane faster and help him check bush while giving much damage his ultimate make him overpowering the enemy and pushing the turrents much faster he can deal a maximum amount of damage while going as a roamer his ultimate is the best weapon for team fight and push faster and to support as he can carry one of his team
hero.hero_weakness:
Going for roamer lane directly give the disadvantages to your jungler as enemy likely will dominate the jungler and it will slow down your ultimate to get
This hero mostly depends on his ultimate so using the ultimate unnoticing the target will make the enemy to gang on your team and giving enemy a Great advantages to push faster and level up faster so he need a target before using his ultimate
This hero mostly depends on it's build

spell.spell_desc:
He can support the teammates and help the teammates to escape and this spell can chase the low HP enemy to kill
So as of my prospective this battle spell is the best and fit the characteristic of johnson

dominants.dominant_desc:
5 Steps to do first the first 5 mins. of match

(1st)
Help Jungler to clear their first Objective,

(2nd)
Help Mid Laner to clear their mid lane,

(3rd)
Help Gold or Exp Laner to clear their lane

(4th)
Help Jungler to kill the 1st Turtle

(5th)
Go to the lane that needs your help/assist

Tough Boots [Encourage]: Crowd control and slow duration redcued by 30%.

Fleeting Time: Hero kills or assists reduce the Ultimate's current cooldown by 30%.

Immortality: Revives 2.5s after death and gaining 16% Max HP and 220-1200 shield (scales with level) that lasts for 3s. (210 cooldown).

Dominance Ice: 
[Arctic Cold] - Taking damage will reduce the Attack Speed of the attacker to 80% of normal for 1s.
[Lifebane] - Taking damage will reduce the Shield and HP Regen effects of the attacker to 50% of normal for 1s.


Antique Cuirass: When hit by a skill, reduces the attacker's Physical Damage by 6% for 2s (this effect stacks up to 3 times).

Athena's Shield: Upon taking Magic Damage, gains 25% Magic Dmage Reduction for 3s (applies before taking damage). Regains this effect 5s after leaving combat.

spell.spell_desc: Gain 50% extra Movement Speed and Slow Immunity for 6s.

It's a defense build i rarely use if the enemys are tanky fighter then i recommend this build.

hero.hero_overview: Johnson is a tank support hero with a special ability of transforming in to a car and roam around. It's ulti help him to roam all over the map gank and support mates.
hero.hero_strength: As I'm providing you the magic attack build let me tell you it's power source. Johnson mainly two power source one from its 2nd skill AOE with deals magic damage and other after crashing it's ulti which give huge radius zone giving continues damge with AOE both skill damage can be max out with magic builds. Use your 2nd skill as main damge source .
hero.hero_weakness: Johnson is a tank support using its as a mage give it high magic power also high hp not too much but enough making it weak agains hero using hp per centage damage like Zhask.

data.recommend: Jhonson is not meta but mastery it will help you and your team  all version as it's special ability and stats

counters.counter_desc:
Martis
Martis is one of the few heroes in the Land of Dawn who gains control immunity when using a certain skill This comes from his second spell  Mortal Coil Use Mortal Coil to avoid getting stunned by Johnsons Rapid Touchdown and stop him on the spot. Strike him with Ashura Aura and basic attacks before finishing him off with Decimation After getting your damage items  purchase defensive items like Dominance Ice and Radiant Armor  so you wont take much damage on the initial collision and ensui

dominants.dominant_desc:
Once you reach level 4, keep a lookout on the mini map and see which lane needs assistance. Then use ultimate ultimate and drive your way to provide support! If allied heroes are returning, wait at the base and let them take a ride. Moving together with your ally will make Johnsons ultimate ultimate more powerful.
For mid game, move together with your allies as much as possible. Avoid soloing lanes to farm while your allies are clashing somewhere. Before entering any clashes.
dominants.dominant_title: If you reach lvl.4 focus on your lane

Inspire
Inspire (Talent)
Gain 5% extra Cooldown Reduction.
Bargain Hunter
Bargain Hunter
Equipment can be purchased at 95% of their base price.
Impure Rage
Impure Rage
Dealing damage with skills deals 4% of target's Max HP extra Adaptive Damage and restores 2% Mana on hit. (If the hero does not use Mana, restores 1% HP instead, and deals up to 120 Damage to non-hero units. Cooldown: 5 seconds.

equips.equip_desc: I try more different ways to use equipment like tank build some pro build that I didn't like, this equipment it was more damage than like I thought.

hero.hero_overview:
Need a ride  Johnson  the Mustang  possesses one of the abilities that are completely unique to Mobile Legends  Bang Bang

Using his ultimate  Full Throttle  the tank with support hero can transform into a car  and forcefully smash into enemies  dealing huge damage and slowing them down  What s more  he can bring along an ally during this assault
hero.hero_strength:
Johnson  skills in Mobile Legends
Passive   Electro Airbag
When Johnsons HP drops below a certain percentage, he gains a shield for several seconds. This skill has a long cooldown.

The shield provided by Electro Airbag relies on your physical defense. This means that acquiring physical defense items will result in a larger shield.
When triggered, the skill icon appears alongside buffs and effects. It disappears once it becomes available again.
Use the shield to absorb turret attacks for your
hero.hero_weakness:
Weak to Magic and true damage compared to other tanks
Long skill cooldown, especially passive
Weak before level 4. Hard to invade enemy jungle unlike Grock Grock or Khufra Khufra
No directional blink skills to run away
Hard to control the car freely, need a lot of effort and experience
Too easy to counter or evade the ultimate
Relies on his ultimate as his main source of damage, crowd control and team fights.
Weak against meta heroes (currently) such as Esmeralda Esmeralda, Wanwan Wanwan, Gusion

spell.spell_desc:
deals magic damage to nearby enemies, petrifies them, and slows them down:
Damage: Deals 100 (+15 * Hero Level) magic damage
Petrify: Petrifies enemies for 0.8 seconds
Slow: Slows enemies by 50% for 0.8 seconds after the petrify effect ends
